_data.description: On-premise Online Form that allows easy creation of form for information collection, online applications and survey. Allows integration and full customization.
_data.title: kForm

children.value: kForm is an online form creating tool that helps easy creation of forms to collect information, etc. Similar to other online forms such as Google Forms but with the option to store on-premise and allow unlimited customization and integration.
20+ fields types including location (GIS coordinate), matrix and image preview
Integration with other services including FPX, API and web services

_data.text:
Products

kForm

kForm is an online form creating tool that helps easy creation of forms to collect information, etc. Similar to other online forms such as Google Forms but with the option to store on-premise and allow unlimited customization and integration.

Contact Us
  • On-premise or cloud hosting options
  • 20+ fields types including location (GIS coordinate), matrix and image preview
  • Workflow options
  • Timer suitable for answering quiz
  • Full customization
  • Integration with other services including FPX, API and web services
